hooks.command: input=$(cat); if [[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == */package.json ]]; then if echo "$input" | jq -r '(.tool_input.old_string // .tool_input.content) // empty' | grep -qE '"(commands|menus|submenus|keybindings|views)"'; then echo 'These contributes sections are auto-generated from contributions.json. Edit contributions.json instead, then run: pnpm run generate:contributions' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi
